# CompositeSubpart

**Structure**

A subpart in a Composite part

## Declaration

```swift
struct CompositeSubpart
```

## Initializers

- **init(partIndex:treePartOffset:treeAxisOffset:)**

## Instance Properties

- **partIndex**: The index of the part this subpart renders
- **treeAxisOffset**: The offset of the part’s axis value settings in the render context axis value tree (depth first)
- **treePartOffset**: The offset of the part’s data in the render context transform tree (depth first)

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable

items.description: The index of the part this subpart renders
